name: Fruit Town Piru
description: The Fruit Town Piru (Neighborhood Piru) is a Blood/Piru set formed in the 1970s on the east side of Compton, California, named after fruit-themed streets (Plum, Cherry, Apple, Peach). Active in Fort Worth, Houston, St. Louis, Newark, Norfolk, and Birmingham. They developed a rivalry with Mob Piru in the late 1990s connected to Death Row Records disputes, resulting in several murders. Rappers Chris Brown and Soulja Boy have claimed affiliation.
